title: Getting error whenever trying to create second feature in app
excerpt: So i have created my first features as board view, did the build there and its working find…when i am trying to create second feature of integration it’s give me error "“failed to create new app feature”

posts.author: graceatkins1010 (grace)
posts.cookedHtml: So i have created my first features as board view, did the build there and its working find…when i am trying to create second feature of integration it’s give me error "“failed to create new app feature”

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Have you confirmed youre trying to add the new feature in a draft version of the app not a live version? A live version of course is read-only but the UI is not 100% consistent (yet) on restricting your ability to try to change things.
